ksa_text: Monitor regulatory developments, enforcement actions, and supervisory guidance relevant to organizational data and AI activities, producing impact assessments and management recommendations.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of Privacy Impact Assessment (PIA) principles and practices

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RC-T-008 (Risk and Compliance/Task) scores 0.489 composite (highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.489) and is edge_case for the Data Lifecycle Manager role. Domain prior: edge. Core signal hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority is appropriate for manager-level Data Lifecycle Manager.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis confirms Risk and Compliance competencies at composite 0.489 are consistent with Data Lifecycle Manager hiring criteria.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Market evidence supports this competency for Data Lifecycle Manager. Final decision: include.
